name: ShenZhen WeiYe Decoration Group Co.,LTD
summary: ShenZhen WeiYe Decoration Group Co.,LTD engages in the field of domestic architecture decoration in China. The company undertakes building decoration works; curtain wall for building; the electrical and mechanical design consultant and intelligence service; steel structure engineering comprising industrial and civil construction, municipal engineering, and factory building with steel structure and other projects; and industrial park construction. ShenZhen WeiYe Decoration Group Co.,LTD was founded in 1994 and is based in Jingzhou, China.
